displayTitle: Star Wars (2020) Vol. 05: The Path to Victory
synopsis:
Star Wars (2020) Vol. 5: The Path to Victory is a trade paperback compilation of Marvel Star Wars (2020) Comic Series.
The final hunt! Commander Ellian Zahra, former protégée of Grand Moff Tarkin, has used brilliant tactics and savage brutality to nearly eradicate the Rebel fleet. Now she and her ultimate target, General Leia Organa, will hunt each other across a wild planet…to the bitter end!
Then, it's a Star Wars anniversary celebration with stories spanning from the prequel to sequel eras! Thrill to all-new tales of Obi-Wan and Anakin, Darth Vader, Poe Dameron, and Kylo Ren — drawn by a host of the galaxy's finest artists!
COLLECTING: Star Wars (2020) #26-30
title: Star Wars (2020) Vol. 05: The Path to Victory
